fixing_risk_notes: PTAX is a daily auction average — not a single print, but an average of four intraday surveys
Fixing risk is elevated at month-end, quarter-end, and year-end due to rebalancing flows
BCB can intervene in PTAX window via FX swaps; creates intraday dislocation risk

options.illiquidity_note: 1Y+ vol is wide market; 10D strikes are indicative only in normal conditions

notes: Carry is real and substantial but subject to sudden COPOM repricing
Positive carry for USD long reflects high BRL overnight rates (SELIC)

market_structure.skew_driver: political and fiscal risk premium; capital flow risk
market_structure.liquidity_profile: good in core tenors; thins quickly beyond 6M

risk_notes: Capital controls risk: BCB has history of imposing IOF taxes on FX transactions
BCB intervention: active in spot and NDF markets to manage volatility
Political premium: vol spikes are typically topside-driven on fiscal or political events
NDF settlement: no physical delivery; USD cash settlement eliminates delivery risk but requires credit lines
